stories.headline: Bitcoin rejects $80K, slides under $78K as Iran peace headlines and oil weigh
stories.tldr: BTC failed at $80,000 and dropped roughly 2% below $78,000 as caution dominated despite Iran offering a fresh war-ending proposal to Washington.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A clean $80K rejection ahead of four central-bank decisions hands bears the macro narrative and threatens the breakout setup heading into Bitcoin 2026 week.
the_details: Bitcoin briefly tagged $79,485 in Asian hours before unwinding into the $77,800-$78,000 zone, per CoinDesk.
Ethereum tracked the move lower, sliding to $2,320.84 by 7:24 a.m. ET as altcoins led losses.
Crypto market cap held $2.71T (+1.7% 24h) on $66.6B volume even as risk appetite cooled.

stories.headline: Aave bleeds $8.4B in 48 hours as DeFi TVL sheds $13B post-April exploits
stories.tldr: Post-hack contagion has emptied $8.4B from Aave and stripped over $13B from total DeFi TVL since the Drift and KelpDAO exploits.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Liquidity is fleeing blue-chip lenders, not just compromised protocols — the fallout is now a sector-wide trust shock, not a one-protocol problem.
the_details: More than $8.4B in deposits left Aave in the 48 hours following the back-to-back April attacks.
Drift lost $285M on April 1 via a compromised admin key; KelpDAO lost $292M on April 18 through a LayerZero bridge flaw.
DeFi TVL across all protocols has dropped by more than $13B as users de-risk.

stories.headline: Spot Solana ETF inflows collapse 92% from November peak to just $34M in April
stories.tldr: Spot Solana ETFs pulled only $34M in April, down 92% from $419M in November 2025, signaling cooling institutional appetite for SOL exposure.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: SOL was the institutional-darling alt narrative; a 92% inflow collapse undercuts the Solana ETF thesis just as the Drift hack damages on-chain confidence.
the_details: Spot SOL ETFs took in $419M in November 2025, the post-launch high water mark.
April 2026 inflows have totaled just $34M with three trading days left.
SOL trades near $86.47 with a $49.8B market cap, ranked #7 by capitalization.

stories.headline: Solana's Anza and Firedancer converge on Falcon signatures to harden against quantum
stories.tldr: Solana's two core client teams, Anza and Jump's Firedancer, have independently chosen Falcon post-quantum signatures to future-proof the network.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Independent convergence on the same post-quantum primitive de-risks Solana's roadmap and pre-empts a coming industry-wide cryptography migration.
the_details: Falcon is a lattice-based signature scheme finalized in NIST's PQC suite.
Anza (ex-Solana Labs core) and Firedancer (Jump Crypto) reached the choice independently.
Firedancer is also targeting a throughput jump from ~1,300 TPS toward 1M TPS this year.

stories.headline: The Block taps Steve Chung as CEO, lands $10M from Foresight Ventures
stories.tldr: Crypto media outlet The Block named Steve Chung CEO alongside a $10M raise from Foresight Ventures to fund its next phase of expansion.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Crypto-native media is consolidating around well-funded incumbents — a tailwind for distribution leverage and a signal that VCs still see editorial as strategic.
the_details: Chung succeeds Larry Cermak, who stays on as President focused on research and product.
Foresight Ventures led the $10M check announced April 27.
Capital is earmarked for product expansion and next-phase growth.
